compiled_state.title: ACLI does not support editing priority on existing Jira issues (workitem edit)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: ACLI workitem edit does not support priority via --priority flag, --from-json, or additionalAttributes. Priority edits from bridge-outbound.py are logged as warnings and skipped. See epic 392d-8080 for full context. Upstream ACLI may add support — monitor releases.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Escalated to user: ACLI workitem edit does not support priority field via --priority, --from-json, or additionalAttributes. This is an external tool limitation in the ACLI binary. Workaround: priority edits are logged as warnings and skipped by bridge-outbound.py. Upstream ACLI may add support in future releases. No code change possible.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
